-ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG   -DNDEBUG -shared -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--build-id=sha1
